title: A Shadow in the Garden
content: One evening, Lucy noticed a dark shadow moving through her garden. She quietly watched from the kitchen window, wondering what it could be. The shadow stopped near the flowers and then disappeared behind a tree. Taking a flashlight, she walked outside with her father. They soon discovered a friendly hedgehog searching for food among the plants. The little animal quickly disappeared into the bushes. Lucy was relieved and happy that the mysterious visitor was harmless.
